title: Session 03 — The Cleric and the Witch
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The party met Brolin and Ms. Judy in the impossible house; her price for help was the blood-bowl ritual, which laid bare everyone's pasts — including Judy's life as one of three hag sisters.**

# What happened
- Inside the impossible house they met **[[pc-brolin|Brolin]] Darkpass** (joined the party) and **[[ms-judy]]** — "the one who dines on digits, the wicked witch, the sad bitch."
- She cooked (conjured pig; [[pc-felson|Felson]] requested and **ate a conjured halfling**).
- Judy and Brolin shared their sickness research (the three stages — [[the-sickness]]).
- Her price for help: the **blood-bowl ritual**, done together. Everyone saw pieces of each other's lives.
- Judy's past: one of **three hag sisters** — poisoned wells, twisted children, caged kids, ritual absorption — until a **radiant figure slew her sisters and spared her with a whispered command**.
- Post-ritual: "one good deed can't erase a life of wickedness… but maybe a few thousand will."

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] Judy's price for help — the blood-bowl ritual, done together.
- The radiant figure who slew Judy's sisters and spared her — who, and what was the whispered command?

# Threads
[[ms-judy]] · [[pc-brolin]] · [[the-sickness]]
